title: phegopteris cheilanthoides
intro: Phegopteris cheilanthoides, also known as the Limestone fern or Cheilanthoid fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Phegopteris cheilanthoides include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
